item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes the immediate request in the first sentence and moves somewhat upstream by asking what control point the door-access request is stuck at. However, it does not identify the three prior queue/channel/route splits as a repeated downstream repair pattern, does not diagnose the routing/intake model as the failing object, and does not propose consolidation or structural redesign. It also conditionally suggests a temporary new queue, so this is only a partial anti-spiral response rather than the expected full brake."}
